name: Bubble up Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cut the biscuits into quarters.
3. Stir in 1 cup of spaghetti sauce and 2 cups of shredded mozzarella cheese.
4. Press a garlic clove into the mixture.
5. Add any optional toppings you desire.
6. Pour in the remaining spaghetti sauce and shredded mozzarella cheese.
7. Bake for 30 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown.
Note: This recipe serves a 9x13 inch baking dish. For use in deep-dish pans, prepare half of the recipe.
